items.title: 5-fold cross-validation rotation
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  data["Labeled dataset D"] --> split["Split into 5 folds"]
  split --> f1["Round 1: fold1 val, folds2-5 train"]
  split --> f2["Round 2: fold2 val, others train"]
  split --> f3["Round 3: fold3 val, others train"]
  split --> f4["Round 4: fold4 val, others train"]
  split --> f5["Round 5: fold5 val, others train"]
  f1 --> m1["metric m1"]
  f2 --> m2["metric m2"]
  f3 --> m3["metric m3"]
  f4 --> m4["metric m4"]
  f5 --> m5["metric m5"]
  m1 --> avg["CV score = mean(m1..m5)"]
  m2 --> avg
  m3 --> avg
  m4 --> avg
  m5 --> avg
items.caption: Each sample is validated exactly once; training uses the other k−1 folds.

items.title: Nested CV: inner tune, outer evaluate
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  outer["Outer fold: test slice T"] --> innerTrain["Inner train pool R"]
  innerTrain --> inner["Inner k-fold: tune hyperparams on R"]
  inner --> best["Pick best setting from inner scores"]
  best --> refit["Refit on full R with best setting"]
  refit --> score["Score once on outer test T"]
  score --> report["Report mean over outer folds only"]
items.caption: Inner CV selects settings; outer CV produces the unbiased performance estimate.
